sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f sizing: 1 contract per $7,500 equity (13.33% per unit). Add 1 contract when equity threshold = (current_units + 1) × $7,500. At 2-unit level: $15,000 threshold triggers 2nd contract. Geometric mean optimization with base equity buffer of $8,500.

source_rule_text: Trade additional contracts when equity reaches a threshold level equal to the optimal f unit cost multiplied by the number of units already trading, scaled by the geometric mean optimization curve.
